basic_details.job_title: IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee (IIT Roorkee) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Junior Research Fellow Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their application via Email. The last date to send the application email is 25-05-2026.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: M.E./M.Tech. (Chemical Engineering / Chemical Technology / Civil Engineering / Environmental Engineering / Mechanical Engineering / Materials Engineering) with GATE or M.Sc./M.Tech. (Chemistry / Physics / Materials / Environmental Chemistry) with NET/GATE
qualification.details: M.E./M.Tech. (Chemical Engineering / Chemical Technology / Civil Engineering / Environmental Engineering / Mechanical Engineering / Materials Engineering) with GATE or M.Sc./M.Tech. (Chemistry / Physics / Materials / Environmental Chemistry) with NET/GATE. Desirable: Prior work/experience with polyurethane coatings, phase change materials, and asphalt pavements.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Roorkee?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Roorkee is 25th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have an M.E./M.Tech. in relevant engineering fields with GATE or M.Sc./M.Tech. in science fields with NET/GATE.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Roorkee.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST).

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection process for this position will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What are the desirable qualifications for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Prior work or experience with polyurethane coatings, phase change materials, and asphalt pavements is considered desirable.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Roorkee located?
faq.answer: IIT Roorkee is located in Roorkee, Uttarakhand.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for this position is contractual.
